_comment: METADATA ONLY -- contains no game memory. The .halorec recordings and the *.json snapshots built from them contain raw, copyrighted Halo runtime memory and are gitignored / host-only (see ../../../.gitignore and host_snapshots/README.md). This manifest is our own metadata describing how to regenerate the host-only snapshots. Build with: python3 tools/equivalence/build_host_snapshots.py (set $HALO_HALOREC_DIR to the directory holding the .halorec files).

snapshots.note: a10 door-grunt slot6 (awareness=10) + its primary perception prop 0xf7420021. Recording 19 captures the full actor pool (stride 0x724) and perception-prop pool (stride 0x138), so prop/actor-reading functions get real state instead of zero-fill.
a10 door-grunt slot10 (awareness=6) + its primary perception prop 0xf7440024. Mid-alertness state drives a different scorer path than the fully-aware grunt6.
a10 door-grunt slot11 (awareness=6) + its primary perception prop 0xf7430023. Second mid-alertness grunt for additional path coverage.

a10 door-grunt slot10 with an acknowledgeable perception prop. The slot10 primary prop is type 4 / non-acknowledgeable, so this pins a same-frame valid alternate prop for actor_perception_acknowledge.

a10 door-grunt slot11 with an acknowledgeable perception prop. The slot11 primary prop is type 4 / non-acknowledgeable, so this pins a same-frame valid alternate prop for actor_perception_acknowledge.

network_server_message_handler.obj (0x12fd80-0x130580) server-side message dispatch. Live MP-host state: Slayer Pro 'The Bear' on levels/test/carousel with players joined; server global struct @0x5a90e0 (size 0x4bc) + its connection object @0x8aada0. Handlers take server via @<esi>/@<eax>; this pins the real server pointer so the reachable state-guard/decode paths run on real data instead of zero-fill. Stub-based tripwire (guards ABI/@<reg>-marshaling/control-flow/return-value drift); NOT a state-mutation test (state-applying callees are stubbed). SKIPs cleanly when the host recording is absent.

snapshots.recording: Silent Cartographer - Enter vehicle turrent - passenger - driver side sequence - unpatched.halorec
snapshots.note: Unpatched Xbox recording of vehicle seats, turret transitions, and biped attachment states.

snapshots.recording: Pillar of Autumn - AI throwing grenade.halorec
snapshots.note: Unpatched AI state with 44 active actors and 180 perception props.

snapshots.recording: Blood Gultch - Enter exit warthog vehicle.halorec
snapshots.note: Unpatched Warthog enter/exit and physics state.
